title: Logic Puzzle Solver
scenario: Write a program that solves a specific logic puzzle involving five houses, each painted a different color (blue, green, red, white, and yellow), with a different number of rooms (three, four, or five) and a different number of people living in each house (two, three, or four). The program should determine the correct order of the houses based on the following conditions: The blue house is next to the red house. The green house is next to the yellow house. There are three people living in the house next to the house with four rooms. The house next to the house with three rooms contains three people. The house with four rooms does not contain people. The yellow house is next to the house with three rooms.
constraints: Must use a specific logic puzzle solving algorithm
Must handle the given conditions correctly
Must provide a clear and concise solution

evaluationCriteria.description: The solution correctly solves the logic puzzle based on the given conditions.
The solution adheres to the specific logic puzzle and its constraints.
The solution is clear, concise, and easy to understand.
